title: Collector canonical rows
description: The cross-platform output contract. schema_version is bumped on breaking changes; see MAINTAINING.md. Built by collector/schema.py.

account.description: namespace, not the platform account id

content_id.description: bvid / aweme_id. null for Douyin fan-growth (DOM has no id) — join by title+published_at.

join_key.description: Fallback join key when a platform row has no content_id. For Douyin fan-growth this is derived from title + published_at and is not a platform id.

duration_s.description: Work duration in seconds when available.

category.description: Platform category or partition name when available.

category_id.description: Platform category or partition identifier when available.

work_type.description: Platform-native work type when available, e.g. video/image-text/live replay.

is_original.description: Best-effort normalized originality flag when platform data supports it.

platform_fields.description: Raw platform-specific fields preserved for diagnostics when semantics are not canonicalized.

detail.description: Per-video deep analytics from a detail command (bilibili video-detail / douyin item-analysis): e.g. retention_curve [{second, retained_pct}], completion, audience_play_split, terminal_distribution, demographics, fan_conversion, or per-client splits. Present only on detail rows; shapes vary by platform.

published_at.description: ISO8601 where available; Douyin fan-growth rows are a minute-precision local 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' string (DOM-sourced).

metrics.description: Only keys that apply are present (absent = N/A). Standard keys below; platforms may add extras. Detail commands add per-video keys: avg_watch_duration_s (seconds); avg_completion_pct / completion_rate_5s_pct / bounce_rate_2s_pct / bounce_rate_3s_pct / follower_play_ratio_pct / guest_play_ratio_pct (all percent, already normalized — bilibili from basis points, douyin from 0..1 fractions). bounce_rate_3s_pct is Bilibili's 3秒跳出率 (first-14-days window). Bilibili exposes no impressions/clicks and randomizes absolute 封标点击率, so CTR appears only as relative signals under detail.click_through, never as an absolute metric key.

fans.description: per-video fan delta. bilibili: cumulative attributed fans; douyin: 粉丝增量 within the publish-time window. Definitions differ — don't compare blindly across platforms.

fan_inc.description: net fan change that day (涨粉)
